name: Pantene Pro-V Daily Moisture Renewal Shampoo
overview_desc: Cleanses and hydrates hair for a healthy, vibrant glow.

product_page.description: Features a potent blend of Pro-V nutrients and antioxidants so hair is strong against damage. Deeply hydrates and nourishes every strand.

reviews.comment: Makes my hair feel so soft!

name: Pantene Pro-V Repair & Protect Conditioner
overview_desc: Visibly repairs signs of damage in every use.

product_page.description: Helps lock in moisture and deeply penetrates the hair core to repair damage from styling and environmental stress.
product_page.feature_resolution: Deep Repair, Pro-V Nutrients, Moisture Lock.

name: Dove Hair Fall Rescue Shampoo
overview_desc: Fortifies hair from root to tip and reduces hair fall by up to 98%.

product_page.description: Formulated with Nutrilock Actives, this shampoo nourishes hair deeply and helps prevent breakage for fuller-looking hair.

reviews.comment: Noticeable difference in hair fall after 2 weeks.

name: Dove Intense Repair Conditioner
overview_desc: Smooths, strengthens, and helps prevent split ends.

product_page.description: Enriched with Keratin Repair Actives, it works immediately to repair the hair surface while deeply nourishing the core.
product_page.feature_resolution: Keratin Repair Actives, Split End Prevention, Smooth Finish.

name: Head & Shoulders Classic Clean Anti-Dandruff Shampoo
overview_desc: The gold standard for up to 100% flake-free hair.

product_page.description: Clinically proven to protect against flakes, itch, and oil. Provides a deep clean and leaves hair smelling fresh.

name: Head & Shoulders Smooth & Silky Conditioner
overview_desc: Frizz-control and anti-dandruff protection in one step.

product_page.description: Formulated to help repair hair while maintaining your scalp's natural protection against dandruff. Leaves hair silky and manageable.

name: L’Oréal Elvive Extraordinary Oil Hair Serum
overview_desc: Transform dull, lifeless hair into silky, lustrous locks.

product_page.description: A versatile oil enriched with 6 rare flower oils. It provides weightless shine and deep nourishment without any greasiness.
product_page.feature_resolution: Non-Greasy, Flower Oil Blend, Heat Protection.

reviews.comment: A tiny bit goes a long way!

name: L’Oréal Paris Total Repair 5 Hair Mask
overview_desc: Intensive deep conditioning for the 5 signs of damaged hair.

product_page.description: Targets hair fall, dryness, roughness, dullness, and split ends. Rebuilds the hair structure for a smoother feel.

name: Tresemmé Keratin Smooth Shampoo
overview_desc: Salon-quality formula for up to 72 hours of frizz control.

product_page.description: Enriched with Keratin and Marula Oil. Specially formulated to leave your hair gorgeously sleek and manageable.

name: Tresemmé Keratin Smooth Conditioner
overview_desc: Deeply detangles and smooths hair for a professional finish.

product_page.description: The perfect partner to the Keratin Smooth Shampoo. It helps shield hair from the damaging effects of humidity and frizz.

name: Pantene Pro-V Nourishing Hair Oil
overview_desc: Infused with Vitamin E to nourish hair without the heavy feel.

product_page.description: A lightweight oil that penetrates the hair strands to provide deep nourishment and a healthy-looking shine. Perfect for daily use on dry tips.

name: Dove 1-Minute Super Conditioner Mask
overview_desc: An intensive treatment that repairs hair in just 60 seconds.

product_page.description: Formulated with Serum Capsules, this mask helps reconstruct internal hair structure with every use. Ideal for very dry or damaged hair.
product_page.feature_resolution: Serum Capsules, Fast Acting, Deep Hydration.

name: L’Oréal Elnett Satin Extra Strong Hold Hairspray
overview_desc: The legendary hairspray used by stylists worldwide.

product_page.description: Provides a long-lasting hold with a brilliant shine and a satin touch. It disappears at the stroke of a brush, leaving hair clean and soft.

name: Tresemmé Care & Protect Heat Defence Spray
overview_desc: Protects hair from heat damage up to 230°C.

product_page.description: A must-have before blow-drying or flat-ironing. This salon-quality spray helps prevent hair from becoming brittle and dull.

name: Pantene Pro-V Night Miracle Repair Cream
overview_desc: Overnight leave-in treatment for 8 hours of continuous repair.

product_page.description: A non-greasy cream that works while you sleep. It helps restore hair's natural beauty and strength by morning.

name: Head & Shoulders Scalp Care Hair Oil
overview_desc: Soothes itchy scalp while providing moisture to hair.

product_page.description: Formulated to work in harmony with the anti-dandruff shampoo to ensure a hydrated scalp and flake-free hair.

name: Dove Nutritive Solutions Leave-in Cream
overview_desc: Instantly smooths and helps control frizz throughout the day.

product_page.description: A lightweight cream that provides daily nourishment. Just apply to damp hair and style as usual for a soft, manageable finish.
product_page.feature_resolution: Weightless Finish, Frizz Control, Daily Use.

name: L’Oréal Excellence Crème Permanent Hair Color
overview_desc: Triple care color with 100% grey coverage.

product_page.description: Protects as it colors with Pro-Keratin, Ceramide, and Collagen. Rich, long-lasting color with a silky touch.
product_page.feature_resolution: 100% Grey Coverage, Triple Protection, Ammonia-Free options.

name: Tresemmé Keratin Smooth Shine Serum
overview_desc: Professional serum for a high-gloss, frizz-free finish.

product_page.description: The final step to the Keratin Smooth system. This serum polishes the hair surface and controls flyaways for a salon-perfect look.
product_page.feature_resolution: Marula Oil, Silk Protein, Flyaway Control.

name: Pantene Pro-V Airy Fluffy Hair Mist
overview_desc: A refreshing mist to revive flat or tired hair.

product_page.description: Provides an instant boost of freshness and volume. Lightweight formula that leaves hair smelling great without weighing it down.
product_page.feature_resolution: Volume Boost, Refreshing Scent, Fine Mist.
